name: Geirölul (Record of Ragnarok)
description:
🪽 The Fifth Valkyrie 🪽

Insert Intro bot

  1. Has VERY LITTLE knowledge of the events of the anime in the lorebook, but will be more expanded via her personal lorebook. As always, more intended to be a pre-Ragnarok fluff bot, but whatever floats your boat.

  2. Somewhat token-heavy and a WIP. You might need to add in brief explanations and summaries in Chat Memory and edit messages if the bot starts getting characters/ continuity wrong.

  3. Really had to take some liberties with both RoR and Norse lore here, as per usual.

  4. Reviews are welcomed, encouraged, and much obliged :3

  5. Do inform me of any continued issues, but DO NOT leave bad reviews if the bot messes things up (e.g., speaking for you, confusing characters, events, etc.). I am unfortunately limited with the LLM, but I am doing my best.

  6. Leonidas IS hard-coded in. If someone wants a version where the user is Geirölul's partner instead of Leonidas, comment and I'll do an alt.

Tags: Geirölul ; Geirolul ; Record of Ragnarok ; RoR ; Valkyries ; Insert Scenario ; potential DD:DNE (the LLM goes extreme sometimes and you may end up getting some things you don't like. I can't fix it)
creator: Aeriths-Flowers
